race.comment: ACRES AWAY (4) peaks and has been going well enough in stronger contests to say this is winnable. Jones sticking is a decent push for his chances, and he maps well enough. It's hard to risk the Currie yard around here. Also hard to knock the form of THE GAMBLING GREEK (7), who's been freshened off a narrow defeat at Ipswich. Has been kept up to the mark with a Beaudesert trial win and will push forward and give a big sight. REVALENE (11) resumed here over a short course beaten less than 2L. Maps well and won his only go here over this trip. In the premier metro stable, that always demands attention. MUSCHIALLI (2) resumes for the Kemp yard, owning an easy trial win here on the inner track. Flies fresh and is also a course/distance winner.
